task:
Port the following simple TypeScript components from /Users/sachinkoli/github/hoocode/packages/tui/src/components/ to Python in /Users/sachinkoli/github/pycortex/packages/tui/components/src/cortex/tui/components/

Components to port:
1. spacer.ts - Simple spacer component
2. truncated-text.ts - Text component that truncates to fit viewport width
3. text.ts - Text component with word wrapping
4. box.ts - Container component with padding and background

For each component:
1. Read the TypeScript source file
2. Create a Python module with snake_case naming
3. Use Protocol for Component interface (import from cortex.tui.render)
4. Use the utility functions from cortex.tui.util (visible_width, wrap_text_with_ansi, apply_background_to_line, truncate_to_width)
5. Match the TypeScript API exactly (same methods, same behavior)

Also create tests for each component in /Users/sachinkoli/github/pycortex/packages/tui/editing/tests/test_components.py

After porting, run:
- uv run ruff check packages/tui/components/ --fix
- uv run ruff format packages/tui/components/
- uv run pyright packages/tui/components/
